tool_args.label: Flatbush Avenue Bus Priority

payload.description: Bus priority improvements on Flatbush Avenue including curbside bus lanes, offset bus lanes, and center-running bus lanes. Current round focuses on Downtown Brooklyn/Northern Flatbush section.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Flatbush Ave Bus Priority
Current round of design options will focus on Downtown Brooklyn/ Northern Flatbush section of the corridor
Three design options: • Curbside bus lanes • Offset bus lanes • Center-running bus lanes

payload.description: Primary route on Flatbush Ave operating local and limited service from Downtown Brooklyn to Kings Plaza/Bergen Beach. Serves over 28,000 average daily riders.
